heading: Membership
label: 50303 Membership
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)5030336:90e., ; , .June 17, 1932, ch. 268, § 547 Stat. 321July 15, 1942, ch. 505, § 356 Stat. 660In subsection (a), before clause (1), the words “An individual” are substituted for “Any man or woman” and “Others” for consistency in the revised title and to eliminate unnecessary words. In clause (1), the words “either” and “of America” are omitted as unnecessary. In clause (2)(B), the words “citizen of the United States” are substituted for “American citizens” for consistency in the revised title and with other titles of the United States Code.
amendments: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)5030336:90e., ; , .June 17, 1932, ch. 268, § 547 Stat. 321July 15, 1942, ch. 505, § 356 Stat. 660In subsection (a), before clause (1), the words “An individual” are substituted for “Any man or woman” and “Others” for consistency in the revised title and to eliminate unnecessary words. In clause (1), the words “either” and “of America” are omitted as unnecessary. In clause (2)(B), the words “citizen of the United States” are substituted for “American citizens” for consistency in the revised title and with other titles of the United States Code.

children.label: A
children.text: was wounded, gassed, injured, or disabled in the line of duty during time of war while in the service of the military or naval forces of the United States; and

children.label: B
children.text: was honorably discharged or separated from that service or is still in active service in the Armed Forces of the United States; or

children.label: A
children.text: was disabled while serving with any of the Armed Forces of a country associated with the United States as an ally during any of its war periods;

children.label: B
children.text: is a citizen of the United States; and

children.heading: .—No Honorary Memberships
children.label: b .—No Honorary Memberships
children.text: An honorary membership may not be granted.
